attributes.name: nr
attributes.label: Nr
attributes.description: Row identifier (primary key)

attributes.name: type_tinyint
attributes.label: type_tinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte signed integer (-128 to 127); smallest signed integer type

attributes.name: type_smallint
attributes.label: type_smallint
attributes.description: 2-byte signed integer (-32,768 to 32,767)

attributes.name: type_integer
attributes.label: type_integer
attributes.description: 4-byte signed integer (-2^31 to 2^31-1); standard general-purpose integer

attributes.name: type_bigint
attributes.label: type_bigint
attributes.description: 8-byte signed integer (-2^63 to 2^63-1)

attributes.name: type_hugeint
attributes.label: type_hugeint
attributes.description: 16-byte signed integer (-2^127 to 2^127-1); DuckDB-specific, largest signed integer type

attributes.name: type_utinyint
attributes.label: type_utinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte unsigned integer (0 to 255); unsigned variant of TINYINT

attributes.name: type_usmallint
attributes.label: type_usmallint
attributes.description: 2-byte unsigned integer (0 to 65,535); unsigned variant of SMALLINT

attributes.name: type_uinteger
attributes.label: type_uinteger
attributes.description: 4-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^32-1); unsigned variant of INTEGER

attributes.name: type_ubigint
attributes.label: type_ubigint
attributes.description: 8-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^64-1); unsigned variant of BIGINT

attributes.name: type_decimal
attributes.label: type_decimal
attributes.description: Fixed-point exact numeric with 18 significant digits and 4 decimal places

attributes.name: type_numeric
attributes.label: type_numeric
attributes.description: Alias for DECIMAL in DuckDB; identical fixed-point semantics to DECIMAL(18,4)

attributes.name: type_real
attributes.label: type_real
attributes.description: 4-byte IEEE 754 single-precision float (~7 significant digits); inexact

attributes.name: type_float
attributes.label: type_float
attributes.description: Alias for REAL in DuckDB; 4-byte single-precision float, same as REAL

attributes.name: type_double
attributes.label: type_double
attributes.description: 8-byte IEEE 754 double-precision float (~15 significant digits); higher precision than REAL

attributes.name: type_boolean
attributes.label: type_boolean
attributes.description: Logical true/false value

attributes.name: type_char
attributes.label: type_char
attributes.description: Alias for VARCHAR in DuckDB; length specification is accepted but ignored — no fixed-length padding unlike standard SQL CHAR

attributes.name: type_varchar
attributes.label: type_varchar
attributes.description: Variable-length string with no enforced length limit; primary text type in DuckDB

attributes.name: type_text
attributes.label: type_text
attributes.description: Alias for VARCHAR in DuckDB; variable-length string, same as VARCHAR

attributes.name: type_string
attributes.label: type_string
attributes.description: Alias for VARCHAR in DuckDB; variable-length string, same as VARCHAR and TEXT

attributes.name: type_blob
attributes.label: type_blob
attributes.description: Variable-length binary large object; stores arbitrary raw bytes

attributes.name: type_bit
attributes.label: type_bit
attributes.description: Bit string (sequence of 0/1 bits); distinct from BLOB which stores raw bytes

attributes.name: type_date
attributes.label: type_date
attributes.description: Calendar date (year, month, day) with no time component

attributes.name: type_time
attributes.label: type_time
attributes.description: Time of day (hour, minute, second, microsecond) with no date component

attributes.name: type_timestamp
attributes.label: type_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time with microsecond precision; no timezone; default timestamp type

attributes.name: type_timestamp_s
attributes.label: type_timestamp_s
attributes.description: Timestamp with second precision; lower resolution than TIMESTAMP (microseconds)

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.description: Timestamp with millisecond precision; between TIMESTAMP_S and TIMESTAMP

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.description: Timestamp with nanosecond precision; highest resolution timestamp variant

attributes.name: type_timestamptz
attributes.label: type_timestamptz
attributes.description: Timestamp with time zone awareness; does not store timezone — interpreted using the session TimeZone setting

attributes.name: type_interval
attributes.label: type_interval
attributes.description: Duration between two points in time; stores months, days, and microseconds as separate components

attributes.name: type_uuid
attributes.label: type_uuid
attributes.description: 128-bit universally unique identifier; stored natively, not as a plain string

attributes.name: type_json
attributes.label: type_json
attributes.description: JSON data; supports path extraction and manipulation, stored as text internally

links.name: same_check
links.comment: both tables refer to the same data record
